info.title: Thesma API
info.description: Developer-friendly REST API for SEC EDGAR financial data.

get.description: Return a simple liveness probe response.
Return a readiness probe response, verifying database connectivity.

line_items.title: Line Items
line_items.description:
Canonical field name to value mapping. Individual field units vary (revenue in currency units, shares as counts).

**Income statement fields**: revenue, cost_of_revenue, gross_profit, operating_expenses, research_and_development, selling_general_admin, operating_income, interest_expense, interest_income, pre_tax_income, income_tax_expense, net_income, eps_basic, eps_diluted, shares_basic, shares_diluted.

**Balance sheet fields**: total_assets, current_assets, cash_and_equivalents, accounts_receivable, inventory, non_current_assets, property_plant_equipment, goodwill, intangible_assets, total_liabilities, current_liabilities, accounts_payable, short_term_debt, non_current_liabilities, long_term_debt, total_equity, common_shares_outstanding.

**Cash flow fields**: operating_cash_flow, investing_cash_flow, financing_cash_flow, net_change_in_cash, capital_expenditures, dividends_paid, share_repurchases.

**Bank-specific fields** (income statement, populated only for bank/financial institution filings): net_interest_income, interest_and_dividend_income, noninterest_income, provision_for_credit_losses, noninterest_expense.

Use GET /v1/us/sec/financials/fields for machine-readable field metadata.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year of this data point.

ratio.title: Ratio
ratio.description: Name of the ratio being charted.

RatioTimeSeriesResponse.title: RatioTimeSeriesResponse
RatioTimeSeriesResponse.description: Time series for a single ratio.

gross_margin.title: Gross Margin
gross_margin.description: Gross margin as a percentage (64.82 = 64.82%). Computed from revenue and cost of goods sold.

operating_margin.title: Operating Margin
operating_margin.description: Operating margin as a percentage (20.5 = 20.5%). Computed from operating income and revenue.

net_margin.title: Net Margin
net_margin.description: Net margin as a percentage (15.3 = 15.3%). Computed from net income and revenue.

return_on_equity.title: Return On Equity
return_on_equity.description: Return on equity as a percentage (25.0 = 25.0%). Computed from net income and equity.

return_on_assets.title: Return On Assets
return_on_assets.description: Return on assets as a percentage (10.5 = 10.5%). Computed from net income and total assets.

debt_to_equity.title: Debt To Equity
debt_to_equity.description: Total debt divided by total equity (1.5 = 1.5x leverage).

current_ratio.title: Current Ratio
current_ratio.description: Current assets divided by current liabilities (2.0 = 2.0x coverage).

interest_coverage.title: Interest Coverage
interest_coverage.description: Operating income divided by interest expense (5.0 = 5.0x coverage).

revenue_growth_yoy.title: Revenue Growth Yoy
revenue_growth_yoy.description: Year-over-year revenue growth as a percentage (12.5 = 12.5% growth).

net_income_growth_yoy.title: Net Income Growth Yoy
net_income_growth_yoy.description: Year-over-year net income growth as a percentage (8.3 = 8.3% growth).

eps_growth_yoy.title: Eps Growth Yoy
eps_growth_yoy.description: Year-over-year earnings per share growth as a percentage (10.0 = 10.0% growth).

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.description: Total revenue (USD) for the company's latest annual fiscal year.

net_income.title: Net Income
net_income.description: Net income (USD) for the company's latest annual fiscal year.

eps_diluted.title: Eps Diluted
eps_diluted.description: Diluted earnings per share (USD). Uses weighted average diluted share count.

common_shares_outstanding.title: Common Shares Outstanding
common_shares_outstanding.description: Balance sheet period-end common shares outstanding.

dividends_paid.title: Dividends Paid
dividends_paid.description: Cash dividends paid (USD). Negative values indicate cash outflow, per SEC cash flow statement sign convention.

institutional_ownership_pct.title: Institutional Ownership Pct
institutional_ownership_pct.description: Percentage of common shares held by 13F-reporting institutions. Values above 100% are valid.

ScreenerFinancials.description: Raw financial fields from the company's latest annual fiscal year.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the delivery succeeded or was abandoned.
